source: D58685-Rev04-HAL4.0 Traceability Plan.pdf
title: 2. Requirements 需求
text_content: Per procedure INC02, all medical devices need to have a Traceability Plan in place which describes the traceability requirements for the components of the device.  Any future changes to the product require that this plan be reviewed and updated to comply with the product’s related Critical To Safety and Critical To Reliability lists.  The approved Traceability Plan shall be stored in the Device Master Record (DMR). 根据INC02 程序，所有医疗设备都需要有可追溯性计划，该计划描述了设备组件的可追溯性要求。 未来 对产品的任何更改都要求对该计划进行审查和更新，以符合产品相关的关键安全和关键可靠性列表。 经 批准的追溯计划应存储在设备主记录(DMR)中.
